violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food Beef was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food cooked lamb and chicken
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --- No Ansul system provided

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -All equipment surfaces needs to be cleaned. -Handle on fridges need to be cleaned.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. - Cups on floor in back storage area.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Wall behind stove and trach can need to be cleaned.
